column1: Our hearts grow with us. They get _____ as we do. (big)
The snake is as _____ as a bus. (long)
The scorpion is one of the _____ creatures. (poisonous)
It was the _____ accident in the city's history. (bad)
Which is _____ : Test One or Test Two? (easy)
The tortoise is one of the _____ animals in the world. (slow)
Seedless plants are the _____ plants on the planet. (old)
A tortoise is a reptile with a shell on _____ back. _____ moves very slowly. (it, it)
